Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC31F "CASTLEMASTERII-4DF0-C31F" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $4df0 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Castle Master II - The Crypt.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Copied colour RAM to $D800 in actual ram and then added an init routine at $4DF0 to restore back to colour RAM from there. This allows the game to start after the decrunching step of the original and thus more quickly.
